context.projectOverview: Calendar planner sub-system. Sprint 1 (DONE) = pure deterministic slotter + types + dry-run CLI. Sprint 2 (DONE) = CalendarConnector interface (src/calendar/connector.ts) + zero-egress .ics exporter (src/calendar/ics-connector.ts) + `bober calendar plan --export-ics`. This Sprint 3 adds the SECOND connector: a Google Calendar connector via the external-MCP subprocess pattern, gated behind a NEW default-false fail-closed cloud-calendar egress axis + a `calendar` config section, sending ONLY calendarSafeTitle to the cloud.

completedSprints.title: Deterministic slot-fill engine + dry-run plan CLI
completedSprints.summary: src/calendar/{types,slotter,finding-source}.ts + src/cli/commands/calendar.ts. Finding has calendarSafeTitle?, evidence[], title, tags[]. planSlots consumes BusyInterval[] + ranked Finding[] -> ProposedPlan. commit 0d141c1.

completedSprints.title: Connector interface + .ics export
completedSprints.summary: src/calendar/connector.ts defines CalendarConnector { readonly name; readFreeBusy(window): Promise<BusyInterval[]>; writeEvents(items: PlanItem[]): Promise<WriteResult> } + WriteResult { writtenCount, target } + FreeBusyWindow. src/calendar/ics-connector.ts implements it (createIcsConnector). The Google connector this sprint MUST implement the SAME interface. commit 0481407.

relevantFiles: src/calendar/connector.ts (the CalendarConnector interface the Google connector MUST implement)
src/calendar/types.ts (Finding with calendarSafeTitle?, evidence[], title, tags[]; PlanItem; BusyInterval)
src/medical/egress.ts:5-58 (EgressGuard pattern — model the new cloud-calendar guard on this; fail-closed throw naming the flag)
src/config/schema.ts:374-401 (MedicalSectionSchema — model the new `calendar` config section on this; ADDITIVE — no-flag/default path must stay byte-identical for existing config)
src/mcp/external-client.ts:69 (error sanitization — strip KEY=VALUE, never include token/mcpEnv), :81-103 (listTools/callTool discovery pattern the production adapter wraps)
src/medical/whoop/whoop-token.ts (0600 token sidecar reader pattern; refuse with .ics suggestion when token absent)
src/cli/commands/medical.ts:53-62 (runWhoopSync axis-off branch — check the guard BEFORE constructing any MCP client)
.bober/principles.md (ESM .js imports, Zod for the config section, node:fs/promises, type-only imports, unicode section headers)
